title: President Biden releases 2023 tax returns while Trump again declines
shortDescription: While President Joe Biden released his 2023 federal tax returns, presumptive Republican Donald Trump is again declining to release his.

title: Trump trial: small clashes and provocative signs outside an NYC courtroom
shortDescription: Police barricades tried to separate small crowds of pro- and anti-Trump demonstrators who occasionally tousled but largely remained in their own camps

title: No judge recusal, alleged gag order violations: Trump Trial Day 1 takeaways
shortDescription: Takeaways from Donald Trump's first day of jury selection include Judge Juan Merchan sticking with case but not ruling on possible gag order violation

title: Congress grapples with foreign aid after Iran attack on Israel
shortDescription: The future of a foreign aid package is up in the air after a weekend missile attack on Israel.

title: OnPolitics: Donald Trump on trial
shortDescription: Donald Trump is the first former president to face criminal charges in US history.

title: 42 questions you would have to answer to be a juror on Trump's criminal case
shortDescription: Jury selection is scheduled to start Monday in Trump's hush money criminal case. Lawyers will ask potential jurors 42 questions to find political bias

title: Trump cites Founding Fathers in arguing for immunity to Supreme Court
shortDescription: Trump's lawyers cited writings from Washington and Madison to bolster his case that allowing presidential prosecutions invites political abuse.

title: Haley joins the Hudson Institute after dropping out of the GOP primary
shortDescription: The former South Carolina governor and GOP presidential candidate will join a conservative think tank in Washington, D.C.

title: Trump's trial: Choosing jurors, targeting voters in weirdest campaign ever
shortDescription: Candidates have run from their basement and their front porch and the Rose Garden. But Trump's criminal trial? We've never been here before.

title: Trump stands criminal trial in historic case
shortDescription: Donald Trump's hush money trial began April 15, 2024, making him the first former U.S. president to stand criminal trial.

title: Trump trial not about hush money but hiding it in business records
shortDescription: Donald Trump isn't charged with paying hush money to silence a porn star, but in hiding the payment through allegedly falsifying business records.

title: Supreme Court 1st Amendment case from BLM activist DeRay Mckesson
shortDescription: The issue of whether a Black Lives Matter protest organizer can be sued by a police officer involves the First Amendment right to protest.

title: Trump attacks Michael Cohen, despite gag order in hush money trial
shortDescription: Donald Trump attacked his former lawyer Michael Cohen, who could be a key witness in his money trial starting Monday, despite a gag order.

title: Debunking IRS, tax claims at April 15 deadline | Fact check roundup
shortDescription: A roundup of IRS and tax-related Fact Checks: Social media users wrongly say a fourth stimulus check is coming and people aren't legally bound to file.

title: Trump's hush money trial timeline: How long with the trial last?
shortDescription: Donald Trump's criminal trial over hush money payments issued to Stormy Daniels starts Monday with jury selection. How long with the trial last?

title: Judge won't recuse from Donald Trump's New York hush money case
shortDescription: New York Judge Juan Merchan refused to recuse himself from former President Donald Trump's criminal hush money case on the first day of the trial.

title: Unleash America was meant to fund GOP Va. candidates. What happened?
shortDescription: Not a single dollar was spent to support Virginia's 2023 GOP candidates by a super political action committee dedicated to do just that.

title: Voter turnout doubles in Alabama's redrawn congressional district
shortDescription: Thanks to a newly created congressional district, voter turnout in Montgomery has increased by 133% since 2022.

title: Trump slams NY hush money case as 'nonsense' as he enters courtroom
shortDescription: Minutes after Trump entered the courtroom, his campaign texted out solicitations for donations and accused his opponents of trying "destroy" him.

title: Supreme Court snubs House Republicans who dodged security after Jan. 6
shortDescription: Three GOP members of Congress sued the House sergeant-at-arms and another official after they were fined for violating post-Jan. 6 security rules.

title: Will Trump's hush money trial be televised? No, here's why
shortDescription: Donald Trump's hush money trial begins Monday, making him the first former president on criminal trial. Only a select few will be able to watch live.

title: Here are some potential key witnesses in Trump's hush money trial
shortDescription: Trump's trial for business fraud charges related to the hush money issued to Stormy Daniels and Karen McDougal starts Monday. These people could testify.
